creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
After about 3 hours of using my laptop, I decided to leave X11, so I hit CTRL-ALT-BACKSPACE and I saw this:
http://omploader.org/vMnR5dg

rest of the description/hardware/etc is here:
http://freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=140655

How-To-Repeat: This problem occurs randomly, I can safely kill X11 wit CTRL-ALT-BACKSPACE shortcut.
